lead.name: NMBD project team
lead.bio: Experienced team planning and delivering paving, masonry and garden projects from quote to completion across the Stockholm area.

tjanster.title: Our services
tjanster.intro: We handle the full outdoor environment — from groundworks and drainage to paving, masonry and garden design in Saltsjö-Boo, Värmdö and the Stockholm area.
tjanster.outro: Not sure which solution fits? We are happy to advise and provide a free quote.

stenlaggning.title: Paving
stenlaggning.summary: Driveways, paths and patios in natural stone and setts.
stenlaggning.intro: We lay durable stone surfaces with the right sub-base, drainage and fall — tailored to your site, traffic and aesthetics.
body: Paving is at the core of what we do. Whether it is a new driveway, terrace or garden paths, we plan the surface with you and choose stone that suits both the setting and use.
We work in Saltsjö-Boo, Värmdö, Nacka and the wider Stockholm area. Every project starts with a site visit and free quote.

betongplattor.title: Concrete slabs
betongplattor.summary: Hard-wearing slabs for terraces, paths and yards.
betongplattor.intro: Concrete slabs give an even, low-maintenance surface with many formats and colours — ideal when you want function and modern design.
body: We lay concrete slabs on a stable base with correct jointing so the surface lasts for generations. Slabs work both beside the house and for larger areas around garages and entrances.
Together we choose size, pattern and edge details. Groundworks and drainage are part of our full-service approach.

tradgardsdesign.title: Garden design
tradgardsdesign.intro: We shape outdoor spaces that feel considered — with the right proportions, planting and hard surfaces in balance.
body: Garden design with us is more than planting. We see the whole: paths, walls, lighting and surfaces that connect the house to the garden.
From sketch to finished installation you get a partner who can both design and build — without losing quality along the way.

murning.title: Masonry
murning.summary: Retaining walls and natural stone walls.
murning.intro: Walls create levels, boundaries and character. We build in natural stone with a focus on stability and timeless form.
body: Whether you need a retaining wall on a slope, a low boundary around a patio or a natural stone facade, we build the solution from the ground up.
We often combine masonry with paving and steps so the whole feels coherent.

total-renovering.title: Full renovation
total-renovering.summary: Complete outdoor renovations from idea to finish.
total-renovering.intro: When the whole outdoor space needs renewal we take the project from demolition and groundworks to finished stone, walls and planting.
body: Full renovation suits when several tasks must be coordinated — for example a new driveway, patio, wall and planting in one phase.
You get one contact person, a clear timeline and a result where every part works together aesthetically and technically.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Answers to what we are asked most often — pricing, timelines, ROT and how a project works.

items.a: Price depends on area, stone choice, ground conditions and whether drainage is needed. After a site visit we provide a fixed quote. ROT deduction of 30% on labour can reduce the final cost.
Yes. We start with a site visit, discuss your wishes and provide a written quote at no cost.

items.q: How long does a project take?
items.a: Smaller paths may take a few days. Larger driveways or full renovations can take several weeks depending on weather and scope. You get a timeline in the quote.

items.q: Which areas do you work in?
items.a: We are based in Saltsjö-Boo and work in Värmdö, Nacka, Tyresö and the wider Stockholm area. Contact us if you are unsure — we will confirm coverage.

items.q: Can I use the ROT deduction?
items.a: Yes, on labour for approved work such as paving, masonry and groundworks. We help with documentation for the Swedish Tax Agency.
Contact → site visit → quote → planning → execution → final walkthrough. You have one contact person throughout.
Setts, granite, cobbles, concrete slabs and natural stone from established suppliers. We recommend materials based on site, use and budget.

items.q: Do I need to do groundworks myself?
items.a: No. We can handle excavation, drainage, sub-base and finishing as part of the job.

items.q: How long is your waiting time?
items.a: Waiting time varies by season. Contact us for the current schedule — the earlier you book, the easier to plan spring and summer.
Yes. We have liability insurance and the company org. no. is 559331-3306. References and project photos can be shown on request.

om.title: About NMBD
om.intro: Nordiska Mark, Bygg & Design AB plans and builds outdoor environments in the Stockholm area — from paving and masonry to garden design.
om.companyBody: Founded in 2021 and based in Saltsjö-Boo. Every project starts with a site visit and free quote. We coordinate groundworks, stone and planting so the result lasts.
om.teamIntro: Experienced craftspeople and project leads — one contact team from quote to finished project.
trustPoints: 30% ROT deduction on labour where applicable
References and project photos on request

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.intro: We protect your personal data. This policy describes what we collect via the website and contact form.

sections.title: What data do we collect?
sections.body: Via the contact form we may process name, email, phone, message and optional service choice. Data is used to respond and provide quotes.

sections.title: Legal basis and retention
sections.body: Processing is based on responding to your request (legitimate interest/contract). Data is kept as long as needed for the enquiry and per accounting rules.

sections.title: Sharing and cookies
sections.body: We do not sell personal data. Form data may be processed via our email and hosting providers within the EU/EEA. The site uses essential cookies for language preference if enabled.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: You may request access, correction or deletion by emailing info@nmbd.se. You may also complain to the Swedish Authority for Privacy Protection (IMY).
